content_body: Girl's Retreat Year #3 ~ Thank you so much for sharing your beautiful home with us! We enjoyed shopping, relaxing, and a lot of laughs! The terrace level was so perfect for our spa day ~ the hot tub was the perfect touch! The fire pit was our gathering place in the evenings and we so enjoyed the views. Thank you again and we will be back!
title: Girls Retreat in our Blue Ridge Cabin Rental
